summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MCP Server Management features. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend flows working correctly - Add Server Modal, URL parsing, preview step, server list with dynamic servers showing correct badges and action buttons.

minor.issue: Was failing when npm_package was empty (tried to install server name as package) - FIXED in mcp_manager.py

passed_tests: POST /api/servers/parse-github - parses GitHub URL with subpath (official MCP servers format)
POST /api/servers/parse-github - parses simple GitHub repo URL
POST /api/servers/parse-github - returns 400 for invalid URL
POST /api/servers/parse-github - returns 400 for empty URL
POST /api/servers/add - adds new MCP server successfully
POST /api/servers/add - returns 409 for duplicate server name
POST /api/servers/add - returns 400 when name is missing
GET /api/servers/{name} - returns server details with status
GET /api/servers/{name} - returns 404 for non-existent server
POST /api/servers/{name}/credentials - saves encrypted credentials
GET /api/servers/{name}/credentials - returns masked credential values
POST /api/servers/{name}/credentials - returns 404 for non-existent server
POST /api/servers/{name}/start - starts MCP server and returns tools
POST /api/servers/{name}/stop - stops running server
POST /api/servers/{name}/start - returns 404 for non-existent server
DELETE /api/servers/{name} - removes server and cleans up
GET /api/apps - includes Chatwoot as builtin with type='builtin'
GET /api/apps - includes dynamic servers with type='dynamic'
GET /api/apps - shows 'connected' status for running dynamic servers
Auth: parse-github requires authentication
Auth: add server requires authentication
Auth: GET /api/apps requires authentication
Frontend: Login page loads and authenticates correctly
Frontend: Dashboard Hub shows Chatwoot with chevron (builtin indicator)
Frontend: '+ Add MCP Server' button visible and opens modal
Frontend: AddServerModal URL input and Detect Package button work
Frontend: Preview step shows detected package info (name, runtime, npm_package, command)
Frontend: Dynamic servers appear in list with GitBranch icon
Frontend: Dynamic servers show status badges (Running/Stopped/Not configured)
Frontend: Dynamic servers show delete button (not chevron)
Frontend: Delete action removes server from list
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: mcp_manager.py install_server_package() was using server name as package when npm_package was empty - now skips installation if no package specified
updated_files: /app/backend/mcp_manager.py (lines 254-295 - skip npm/pip install when package is empty)
seed_data_creation: Test servers created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: MCP Server Management fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/servers/parse-github (parses GitHub URL), POST /api/servers/add (installs and registers server), POST /api/servers/{name}/credentials (saves encrypted creds), POST /api/servers/{name}/start|stop (manages subprocess), DELETE /api/servers/{name} (removes server). Frontend: AddServerModal.js handles multi-step flow (url -> preview -> credentials). DashboardHub.js shows both builtin (Chatwoot with chevron) and dynamic servers (with start/stop/delete buttons). Dynamic servers use GitBranch icon and show runtime badge. Status badges: Running (green), Stopped (yellow), Not configured (gray).
